title: Base-b digit count: n < b^k => at most k digits
statement_informal: A number below b^k has at most k base-b digits (= floor(log_b n)+1).

cost_model.notes: Each digit costs one division by b; generalizes binary search.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 2 §4.1 / §4.4 — positional number systems, radix conversion.
